title: Language Change - Checking pop up if at least one component is at low battery
scenario: Verify that changing the language shows an "Update currently not available" pop-up when at least one component has low battery.
steps: 1. Ensure at least one component (headset, earbud, or smart case) is at low battery level.
2. Attempt to change the language on the device.
3. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
expected: A pop-up message "Update currently not available, please try back later" should appear.
